title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for running LLMs locally with a self-hosted REST API and Docker-style model pulls.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, exposing sync/async APIs to chat, generate embeddings, and manage local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers, providing typed wrappers for chat, generate, and model APIs.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models into LangChain as LLM and embedding providers.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web dashboard for Ollama with chat UI, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama exposing synchronous & reactive APIs for chat, generate, and embeddings.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby objects and streaming support.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Lightweight Node CLI for pulling, listing, and chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local LLM code completion via Ollama, with inline suggestions and chat pane.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET SDK for Ollama with async methods for chat, generate, and embeddings.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to local Ollama instances for quick prototyping.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selectors and horizontal scaling options.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that spins up Ollama containers to run model tests or generate docs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed HTTP client and async SSE streams for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Custom n8n node that adds Ollama chat & generate operations to no-code workflows.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI note assistance using Ollama, supporting summarization and Q&A.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-run Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, and Open-WebUI with GPU passthrough.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI for Ollama featuring chat history, model downloads, and dark mode.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI microservice that proxies and extends Ollama endpoints with JWT auth and rate limits.
